title: Asukas Left Eye in 30
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Asuka's Left Eye in 3.0             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Dec 16, 2012 5:48 am There's been enough discussion about this for it to merit its own thread IMO. basically discussion revolves around this image: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Sun Dec 16, 2012 5:50 am I think because anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 16, 2012 5:55 am The image is so low-res, Shinoyami, it wouldn't hurt to resize it. Also worried that over-specializing into an "Asuka's left eye" thread means leaving something borderline spoiler in a thread title. ("Yes, Asuka's eye does something in 3.0 worthy of being discussed.")

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Dec 16, 2012 6:05 am Ok, I resized it, is that better?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Dec 16, 2012 6:14 am Eyepatch speculation has been going on since the :3 pic at the end of 2.0, so it's no surprise we'd be speculating still. The current title rev should be fine. Also, Pattern Blue, anyone.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Dec 16, 2012 6:55 am Mr. Tines wrote: Also, Pattern Blue, anyone.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 16, 2012 7:23 am CJD wrote: the pain in her eye during the 6 minute preview

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Dec 16, 2012 7:39 am Hmmm, that makes sense. I still think she's got a little angel in her, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Dec 16, 2012 8:53 am Yeah, I resolutely believe that the blue-glowing beserk eye must symbolise... Something. And I am determined to thwart the "eye-patch makes green iris magically turn blue and become smaller" argument at every turn. I mean, there has to be something under that eyepatch she doesn't want people to see, otherwise why wear an eyepatch? And it's not like she lost an eye, otherwise where is the blue glow coming from?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Dec 16, 2012 9:03 am I mean, she's already glowing from the eyes. It's not too much conjecture to say that beast mode affects a hole in her skull different than an actual eye.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Sun Dec 16, 2012 9:23 am She's got a one shot laser instaled in the socket. She's gonna kill Gendo with it in Final.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Dec 16, 2012 11:09 am Asuka stole Gunther Hermann's skull gun? LOL

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Dec 16, 2012 11:29 am Kendrix wrote: I mean, she's already glowing from the eyes. It's not too much conjecture to say that beast mode affects a hole in her skull different than an actual eye.

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Sun Dec 16, 2012 2:48 pm Shinoyami65 wrote: And it's not like she lost an eye, otherwise where is the blue glow coming from?

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Sun Dec 16, 2012 3:26 pm JoeD80 wrote: Check the shot in 2.0 when Ritsuko is looking down to her containment/coffin thing. There's a probe or something going into her eye.

[]:             Quote Post by UBERGEEKZILLA » Sun Dec 16, 2012 3:27 pm maybe it is a robotic eye or glass eye

[]:             Quote Post by pioneer » Sun Dec 16, 2012 4:42 pm I was thinking that both eye sockets glow blue, but whatever colour Asuka's right eye's iris is makes the light appear to be green because of the iris tint?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 16, 2012 4:57 pm Mari enters Beast Mode. Both of her irises glow green. Asuka enters Beast Mode. Her right iris glows green, similar to Mari. As for the left: something at approximately the location of Asuka's pupil is putting out a fluorescent blue point of light. The discrepancy is clearly supposed to get our attention. Odds are we are supposed to connect this to the fluorescent blue Angel that Asuka had a close encounter with, and not get mired in the technicalities of what wavelengths of light her eyepatch absorbs.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Dec 16, 2012 5:14 pm Reichu wrote: Odds are we are supposed to connect this to the fluorescent blue Angel that Asuka had a close encounter with

[]:             Quote Post by Shakabutt » Sun Dec 16, 2012 5:47 pm Also i wanna point out that Asuka doesn't seem able to close it. When she ejects and says "sorry 02 " etc she closes only one eye, it seems she can't controll it ? Or maybe that part of her face is so deformed that shes got no more eyelids.

olutely believe that the blue-glowing beserk eye must symbolise... Something.
